title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (A), UNDER "(22) ILOILO," PARAGRAPH (F), SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6640 / 53 OG No. 17, 5519 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1772, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (A), UNDER "(22) ILOILO," PARAGRAPH (F), SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

a

), under "(22) Iloilo," paragraph (

f

), section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"(a)

1.

Tigbauan Central School Home Economics Building, Repair ....................

P 3,500.00

2.

Tigbauan Central School Shop Building, Repair .............

3,500.00

3.

Baroc Atabayan Seawall, Tigbauan ..............................

13,000.00

4.

Jamog Rural Road, Tigbauan ........................................

20,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
